Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Striker]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — A Striker is a soul type characterized by the arrow symbol and strikes against rivals from a distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Striker is a technique used to throw madra out of a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Empty Palm is considered a rotten Striker move.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Striker is a move used by bandits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Striker is a technique used by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Striker is a type of technique.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — Strikers can produce foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — The wall forces the use of Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Striker is a technique used by Lindon.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Striker is a rough technique.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Striker is a technique Lindon can use with condensed black fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — The Lady hurls her Striker technique at the two humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon used a half-formed Striker technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — A Striker technique was used to follow up an attack on the Truegold.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Striker is a technique used by Highgolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — A Striker technique can blast at an opponent's eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — Striker is a technique that can be released from a weapon or a hand.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — The Striker technique looks like lightning hammered straight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Striker is a technique involving five needle-points of sword madra.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — The Striker technique can destroy arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Sophara uses huge Striker techniques.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Strikers are part of the combatants.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — A Striker technique slammed into Tiberian's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Striker is a technique used by Archlords.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Noroloth matches a Striker technique with dragon's breath.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
